original_image_tags: A newspaper clipping, vertically oriented, mounted on brown cardstock with staples. The clipping shows a black-and-white photograph of a diamond-shaped object with a trailing, jagged, light-colored glow or vapor trail against a dark sky.

elements.description: One newspaper clipping from the Associated Press. It contains a photograph of a single bright, irregular, vertically elongated light shape against a dark background. Below the photograph, text describes it as a 'diamond shaped object' and notes it was photographed by J. G. Kirby of Dallas near Amarillo, Texas, in August 1956.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on a black-and-white photograph of a single bright object against a dark background within a newspaper clipping, but Description B adds specific photographer, location, and date details not mentioned in A.
